title: Better Impaling
description: Impaling deals extra damage to mobs touching water or rain, ensuring parity with Bedrock Edition
body:
#  Better Impaling
**Unleash the power of the sea! Turn the trident into a formidable tool against the Drowned of the oceans. Continue harnassing power when it rains! But watch out, because the same applies to your enemies wielding this enchantment.**

# ✅ Features
- **Impaling Enchantment** now does damage to _all_ mobs, not just aquatic mobs, when they are in contact with water
- **Damage amounts** are exactly the same. You can find them [here](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Impaling#:~:text=Trident%20Damage%20by%20Impaling%20level)
- **Server-side**, so that only the server needs the mod on multiplayer, not individual players
